'''vakosho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fibrobronchoscopy|fibrobronchoscopy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-k-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fibrobronchoscopy|fibrobronchoscopy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| vakosho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || vækesheth || vækeshej || vækeshesh || vækeshe
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || vakokoshoth || vakokoshoj || vakokoshosh || vakokosho
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || vakoshoth || vakoshoj || vakoshosh || vakosho
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || vakofshofth || vakofshofj || vakofshofsh || vakofshof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || vakoshotho || vakoshojo || vakoshosho || vakoshoko
|-
| [[Patient]] || vakoshoth || vakoshoj || vakoshosh || vakosho
|-
| [[Possessive]] || vakoshothol || vakoshojol || vakoshoshol || vakoshokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || vakoshoothotho || vakoshoojojo || vakoshooshosho || vakoshooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || vakoshothon || vakoshojon || vakoshoshon || vakoshokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || vakoshothooro || vakoshojooro || vakoshoshooro || vakoshokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
